report.summary: Cycle 8 standup: 6 agent runs since v8 (build-v4, design-v6, community-v6, eod-v6, standup-v7/v8). 2 new learn guides shipped (ZK Rollups $70B+ TVL + DePIN 250+ projects), 12 total learn pages now on disk (7,127 lines). 5 new tweets (#275-279) scheduled Apr 13-19. 2 OG images + 2 social cards created. 35 unique agent cycles today. P0 blocker persists: uncommitted files still need commit+push to deploy.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA FROM V8: 6 agent runs completed — build-v4 (2 new learn guides: ZK Rollups 639 lines + DePIN 522 lines), design-v6 (2 OG images + DePIN breadcrumb/meta fixes), community-v6 (5 tweets #275-279 + newsletter v8 supplement + 2 social cards), eod-v6 + standup-v7/v8 (status tracking).

CONTENT PIPELINE: 12 learn guides now on disk (7,127 total lines), all production-ready. Latest 2: ZK Rollups Guide 2026 (zkSync Era, Starknet, Scroll, SP1 Hypercube, $70B+ L2 TVL) + DePIN Guide 2026 (Helium, Render, Filecoin, Grass, 250+ projects, $10-19B mcap).

SOCIAL PIPELINE: 279 tweets drafted all-time (+5 this cycle). Apr 13-19 now fully scheduled: tax deadline final push, ZK Rollups 5-tweet thread, DePIN launch, post-Pectra convergence narrative, weekend DePIN stats. Newsletter v8 supplement drafted.
PUBLISH STATUS: 626 published slugs (unchanged). PUBLISH_QUEUE empty. 12 learn pages on disk awaiting inclusion. Deploy still pending commit+push.
BUILD HEALTH: 141 TS errors (unchanged from v8). Build fix commit 3b2dd28 still latest. DePIN page got breadcrumb fix (Link components) and twitter:image meta added.
MARKET DATA (last known, egress blocked): BTC ~$68,224-$68,688, ETH ~$2,104-$2,135, F&G 8 (Extreme Fear, 55-day streak). Pectra upgrade Apr 10 (9 days). Tax deadline Apr 15 (14 days).

SEO NOTE: No GSC or Vercel Analytics available from sandbox. 12 learn guides + 12 OG images + 279 tweets + full social campaign ready. Deploy urgency remains critical — Pectra Apr 10 search surge window is 9 days away.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: 9th standup of Apr 1. 35 unique agent cycles today: standup ×8, eod ×7, community ×6, design ×6, build ×4, publish ×4.

V8 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Commit & Deploy — NO CHANGE (P0 blocker persists across all 9 standups, uncommitted files still need push). (2) Batch-scaffold 109 missing page.tsx — NOT STARTED (carried over all day). (3) Capitalize on Pectra window — IN PROGRESS (12 learn guides + 279 tweets + OG images all ready, just needs deploy).

COMPLETED SINCE V8: Build-v4 created 2 new guides (ZK Rollups 639 lines + DePIN 522 lines, 1,161 lines combined). Design-v6 created 2 OG images + fixed DePIN breadcrumbs and twitter:image meta. Community-v6 drafted 5 tweets #275-279 for Apr 13-19 + newsletter v8 supplement + 2 social card SVGs.

P0 BLOCKER (PERSISTENT ALL DAY — 9TH CYCLE): Uncommitted files need commit+push. All 12 learn guides, OG images, social cards, published-pages.ts updates — everything is ready but nothing deploys until this happens. This is the single action that unlocks all work done today.
P1 CARRY-OVER (UNCHANGED): 109 published slugs missing page.tsx (18% indexing gap). Carried over across all 9 standups without action.
P2: 2 slug-mismatched pages. 141 TS errors (stable, non-blocking). defi-yields fallback data gap. Legacy <a href> breadcrumbs on some learn pages (DePIN fixed this cycle, others remain).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT & DEPLOY (P0, CRITICAL, 9TH CONSECUTIVE CYCLE): 12 learn guides (7,127 lines), 12+ OG images, 279 tweets, build fix — all sitting in working tree. Pectra upgrade is 9 days away. Smart Wallets, Restaking, ZK Rollups, and DePIN guides MUST be indexed before Apr 10 to capture search surge. This is now a ~3-minute action (commit+push) that unlocks the entire day's $3,138 of agent output. Recommend: escalate to Jefe as blocking all value realization.

PRIORITY 2 — BATCH-SCAFFOLD 109 MISSING PAGE.TSX: 18% indexing gap. Has been carry-over across all 9 cycles without action. Needs a DEDICATED build cycle that targets ONLY scaffolding. Recommend: next build cycle after deploy addresses this exclusively — no new content until gap is closed.

PRIORITY 3 — MAXIMIZE PECTRA + TAX WINDOW (APR 7-19): Content pipeline is now comprehensive: 12 learn guides covering smart wallets, restaking, ZK rollups, DePIN, Bitcoin L2, intent trading, perpetual DEXs, DeFAI, Bitcoin ETFs, Clarity Act, RWA tokenization, Solana Alpenglow. Social campaign covers Apr 7-19 (14 tweets + newsletter). All deploy-ready. The constraint is exclusively Priority 1.
